result.stdout:
Convert an epoch to date/time and vice-versa

Usage: epoch [options] <value>

Arguments:
  value         The number or date/time to convert, or `now`.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Version 0.1.151+229d2ffb2f03d9ec50686946bc0a0c1788f9dbcd beta
Repo: https://github.com/tonycknight/epoch-cli
